# Java Downloads

Manage OCI Java download tokens from Kubernetes with a reviewed controller-backed runtime.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `jmsjavadownloads` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-jmsjavadownloads-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-jmsjavadownloads:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-jmsjavadownloads-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |

## Notes

- Current package scope is intentionally limited to JavaDownloadToken while report, license, download-record, generated download-url, and work-request helper families stay unpublished.
- The published runtime uses service-SDK work requests for create, update, and delete, keeps generic bind matching scoped to exact compartmentId plus displayName, and leaves the sensitive token value out of status and generated docs.
- This story does not emit Kubernetes Secret side effects for the returned token value; operators must preserve that one-time sensitive output through an out-of-band reviewed path.
- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
- This package is currently hidden from the Supported Resources landing page until a checked-in release manifest promotes it to the customer-visible surface.
